agent_relay.message: Fixed 3 issues: (1) Hub double-launch — startup.sh was starting v15 while systemd started v22. Cleaned startup.sh, fixed restart policy. (2) Bridge 18x restarts — systemd service conflicted with desktop autostart, disabled systemd service. (3) Crontab reorganized and cleaned up.
